description: Olimex ESP32-PoE2 with ESP32-WROVER-E (N4R8), 8MB PSRAM, USB-C, microSD slot, and Ethernet with Power over Ethernet (802.3af). The WROVER module routes the Ethernet clock to GPIO0 and uses GPIO16/17 for PSRAM.

featured_components.description: Built-in LAN8720 Ethernet PHY with PoE — wired networking with no Wi-Fi setup.
featured_components.name: Onboard Ethernet

name: OLIMEX ESP32-PoE2

pins.label: GPIO0
pins.notes: 50MHz RMII reference clock output

pins.label: GPIO1
pins.notes: Default UART0 TX

pins.label: GPIO2
pins.notes: ADC2_CH2, Touch2 — strapping pin (must be low/floating for flash boot) • SPI MOSI

pins.label: GPIO3
pins.notes: Default UART0 RX

pins.label: GPIO4
pins.notes: ADC2_CH0, Touch0

pins.label: GPIO5
pins.notes: Default VSPI CS — strapping pin (outputs PWM at boot)

pins.label: GPIO6
pins.notes: SPI Flash CLK — do not use

pins.label: GPIO7
pins.notes: SPI Flash SD0 — do not use

pins.label: GPIO8
pins.notes: SPI Flash SD1 — do not use

pins.label: GPIO9
pins.notes: SPI Flash SD2 — do not use

pins.label: GPIO10
pins.notes: SPI Flash SD3 — do not use

pins.label: GPIO11
pins.notes: SPI Flash CMD — do not use

pins.label: GPIO13
pins.notes: ADC2_CH4, Touch4 • I2C SDA

pins.label: GPIO14
pins.notes: ADC2_CH6, Touch6 • SPI SCK

pins.label: GPIO15
pins.notes: ADC2_CH3, Touch3 — strapping pin (outputs PWM at boot) • SPI MISO

pins.label: GPIO16
pins.notes: WROVER PSRAM — do not use

pins.label: GPIO17
pins.notes: WROVER PSRAM — do not use

pins.label: GPIO32
pins.notes: ADC1_CH4, Touch9

pins.label: GPIO33
pins.notes: ADC1_CH5, Touch8

pins.label: GPIO34
pins.notes: ADC1_CH6 — input only, no internal pull-up/pull-down

pins.label: GPIO35
pins.notes: ADC1_CH7 — input only, no internal pull-up/pull-down

pins.label: GPIO36
pins.notes: ADC1_CH0 (VP) — input only, no internal pull-up/pull-down

pins.label: GPIO37
pins.notes: ADC1_CH1 — input only, no internal pull-up/pull-down (not exposed on most boards)

pins.label: GPIO38
pins.notes: ADC1_CH2 — input only, no internal pull-up/pull-down (not exposed on most boards)

pins.label: GPIO39
pins.notes: ADC1_CH3 (VN) — input only, no internal pull-up/pull-down
